phase1.task_description:
Virtual table names are incorrectly escaped
**Describe the bug**
When virtual tables are added/created, they are defined as:
```
table_name = escape(uri)
self._cursor.execute(
            f'CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE "{table_name}" USING {adapter.__name__}({formatted_args})',
        )
```
see: https://github.com/betodealmeida/shillelagh/blob/e379e8ac0b3dc2f45217be5084b01934c8a489d3/src/shillelagh/backends/apsw/db.py#L294

In particular, the table name is put in double quotes.
The escape me

```
table_name = escape(uri)

```

In particular, the table name is put in double quotes.
